message:
fix(checkpoint): emit contract violation events to decision stream

When the checkpoint subsystem detects hash chain failures or progress
state violations on append, it now logs FN_CK_007_CONTRACT_VIOLATION
events to the decision stream via push_bounded(). This improves
observability for debugging and audit trails.

Changes:
- Add push_bounded() call when hash chain violation detected on append
- Add push_bounded() call when progress state violation detected
- Update test assertions to account for new violation events: verify
  FN_CK_008_DECISION_STREAM_APPEND count before violation occurs, then
  assert rejection event has proper structure and payload

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
